Your result

Your institution could save £0 this year — equivalent to freeing up 0 full-time staff members.

How we calculate this

Figures combine role-level eligibility, adoption level, and efficiency uplift assumptions drawn from research into AI in higher education. For the full methodology, assumptions, and limitations, read our detailed explainer.
